authorize.title: Authorize {app}
authorize.wantsToConnect: {app} wants to connect to your account.
authorize.wantsToConnectOnMachine: {app} on {machine} wants to connect to your account.

mcpAuthorize.switchOrgError: Couldn't switch organization. Please try again.
mcpAuthorize.summaryFull: Full access to {org} — deploy, create, and manage any resource.
mcpAuthorize.summaryPickOne: Pick at least one resource, or switch to Full access.
mcpAuthorize.summaryOwn: Can create projects in {org} and manage only the ones it creates — nothing else is visible.
mcpAuthorize.authorizeError: Couldn't complete authorization. Please try again.
mcpAuthorize.title: Authorize MCP client
mcpAuthorize.subtitle: An MCP client wants to connect to your Openship account.
mcpAuthorize.orgScopeNote: The client can act only within this organization.
mcpAuthorize.accessNote: You can only grant access you already hold yourself.
mcpAuthorize.fullDesc: Deploy, create, and manage everything in {org} that you can. Best for your own client.
mcpAuthorize.limitedDesc: Restrict the client to only the specific resources you choose.
mcpAuthorize.ownDesc: The client can create new projects and fully manage the ones it creates — it can't see or touch anything else in {org}.
mcpAuthorize.chooseResources: Choose the resources this client may access:
mcpAuthorize.readOnlyDesc: The client can view but not deploy, change, or delete.
mcpAuthorize.missingClientId: Missing client_id — this authorization link is invalid.

acceptInvite.wrongAccount: This invite is for {email}. You're logged in as {currentEmail}.
acceptInvite.needsLoginMid: on Openship. Sign in or create an account with

cloudAuthorize.redirectProtocol: Redirect must use http or https.
cloudAuthorize.redirectUserinfo: Redirect URL must not contain userinfo.
cloudAuthorize.title: Authorize device
cloudAuthorize.instancePost: wants to connect to your Openship Cloud account.

cloudConnect.noCode: The authentication code was not provided. Please try again.
cloudConnect.stateExpired: Connection state expired. Please try again.
cloudConnect.verifyError: Could not verify with Openship Cloud.
cloudConnect.successDescription: Your instance is now linked. You can close this window.

iconPicker.startSearchingHint: Enter a keyword to find icons

restoreWizard.typeToConfirm: Type the service name exactly to confirm
restoreWizard.title: Restore backup
restoreWizard.reviewPre: You're about to restore from backup taken on
restoreWizard.overwriteHint: The next step (Prepare) will verify the backup is downloadable. Nothing destructive happens until you confirm at the Apply step.
restoreWizard.protectLabel: Protect the latest backup from retention prune
restoreWizard.protectHint: Keeps the most recent successful backup safe from automatic deletion, so you can return to "right before this restore" if something goes wrong.
restoreWizard.verifyingHint: Checking artifact presence + integrity at the destination. Service is still running normally.
restoreWizard.preparedInfo: {size} prepared. Service will stop briefly while restore runs.
restoreWizard.restoringHint: Service is stopping → data swap → restarting. Do not close this window.

buildPage.notFoundDescription: This deployment doesn't exist or you don't have access to it. It may have been removed or the link is incorrect.

backups.usedByDesc: Projects and services that back up to this destination
backups.noUsageDesc: When a project or service backs up to this destination, it appears here.
backups.title: Backups
backups.subtitle: External storage targets for project and service backups
backups.emptyDescription: Connect an S3-compatible bucket, an SFTP host, an existing openship server, or a local disk — services will then be able to back up to it.
backups.deletePost: ? This can't be undone. A destination still used by a backup policy can't be deleted.
backups.s3Desc: Any S3-API storage — AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Wasabi, MinIO.
backups.sftpDesc: Push backups over SSH to an arbitrary host with new credentials.
backups.serverDesc: Reuse SSH credentials from a server you've already added to Openship.
backups.localDesc: Write to a directory on the API host. Disabled in cloud mode.
backups.modalPickSubtitle: Pick where your backups will be stored.
backups.modalConfigureSubtitle: Credentials are encrypted at rest and never displayed back.
backups.hintPassword: Leave empty if using a private key
backups.hintServer: Reuses SSH credentials already saved in /servers
backups.noServersPre: No servers configured yet. Add one under
backups.hintAbsolutePath: Filesystem path on the API host. Disabled in cloud mode.
